content: GitHub Actions matrix strategy for Rust multi-arch: macOS targets (x86_64-apple-darwin, aarch64-apple-darwin) use macos-latest native runner with cargo directly. Linux aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu requires cross-rs via Docker on ubuntu-latest runner since GitHub has no ARM Linux runner in the free tier. x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu compiles natively on ubuntu-latest. Key actions: actions/checkout@v4, dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable (with targets:), Swatinem/rust-cache@v2.
